name: Polenta with Ratatouille (Microwaved)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup shredded Monterey Jack cheese, low-fat
recipeInstructions:
1. In a rectangular 3-quart microwave-safe casserole, mix the milk and water.
2. Whisk in the cornmeal and salt.
3. Cover with vented plastic wrap. Microwave on high power for a total of 12 minutes, or until most of the liquid is absorbed. Stir after 6 minutes.
4. Let stand, covered, for 5 minutes.
5. Coat a large no-stick frying pan with non-stick spray. Add the oil and place over medium-high heat.
6. Add the onions, garlic, and green peppers. Cook, stirring frequently, for 5 minutes, or until the onions and peppers begin to soften.
7. Add the eggplant, tomatoes, basil, oregano, and black pepper. Cook, stirring occasionally, for 10 minutes, or until the eggplant is tender.
8. Spoon the vegetables over the cornmeal. Sprinkle with the Monterey Jack cheese.
9. Microwave for 1 minute, or until the cheese melts.
7 minutes attention: 35 minutes total.
